notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien formations, shields with pixel damage, mystery ship, march audio, wave progression, and lives system; minor issues include pixel-art aliens being somewhat rough and bomb shooting rate feeling slightly inconsistent.
An excellent, feature-complete implementation of Space Invaders with authentic mechanics, destructible shields, and synthesized audio, though it mixes frame-dependent and time-dependent movement.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with working waves, shields, mystery ship, and pause/restart, but some balance/authenticity issues and minor state-flow quirks keep it well short of perfect.
